docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED JUN-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY MCFADDEN, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0516802D002, TAG # 034227 BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KEVIN MCFADDEN & DEFENDANT SAMUEL ROBEINSON. LAURA DAZA, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 7/13/16. PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCFADDEN, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL $967.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,057.00, SECURITY DEPOSIT IS $1,167.00. PLAINTIFF ADMITS RESPONSIBILITY FOR $200.00 DAMAGE TO A RUG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SAMUEL
